ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmark_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "thread_count" INTEGER /* Number of threads used in the test */,
  "row_count" INTEGER /* Number of rows in the test matrix */,
  "column_count" INTEGER /* Number of columns in the test matrix */,
  "tr_times_tc" INTEGER /* Product of row count and column count (Tr * Tc) */,
  "block_size" INTEGER /* Block size used in the test */,
  "gflops" REAL /* Number of floating-point operations per second (GFLOPS) achieved in the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test configuration and purpose */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test configuration */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm used in the test */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hardware configuration used in the test */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test run (in seconds) */,
  "memory_usage" INTEGER /* Average memory usage during the test (in MB) */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* Average CPU usage during the test (in percentage) */,
  "gpu_usage" REAL /* Average GPU usage during the test (in percentage) */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, failed, in progress) */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment (e.g., operating system, network configuration) */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_results_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the detailed test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tests_test_results_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_results_id") REFERENCES test_results ("test_results_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tests_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tests_hardware_id FOREIGN KEY ("hardware_id") REFERENCES hardware_configurations ("hardware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_author" TEXT /* Author of the algorithm */,
  "algorithm_date_created" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created */,
  "algorithm_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_configurations" (
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the hardware configuration */,
  "hardware_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware configuration */,
  "cpu_model" TEXT /* Model of the CPU */,
  "gpu_model" TEXT /* Model of the GPU */,
  "memory_size" INTEGER /* Total memory size (in GB) */,
  "storage_size" INTEGER /* Total storage size (in GB) */,
  "network_speed" REAL /* Network speed (in Gbps) */,
  "hardware_vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the hardware */,
  "hardware_date_created" TEXT /* Date when the hardware configuration was created */,
  "hardware_last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the hardware configuration was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, system administrator) */,
  "user_date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the lab */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_results_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the test results */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test run */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric (e.g., GFLOPS, MB/s) */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_results_id")
)
